title: Biermannia virescens
taxonomy: Biermannia virescens is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. Biermannia virescens is further classified into the subfamily Apostasioideae. This subfamily is one of the most ancient and primitive groups of orchids. Biermannia virescens is native to tropical regions of Asia.
